log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Hadozee — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Hadozee — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:8+9=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Hadozee — Unarmored Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Hadozee — Unarmored Caster.
→ Hadozee — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 20] FAIL! 31 necrotic damage. HP: 36/67
--- Hadozee — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 36/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:5+9=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

--- Hadozee — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 36/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:1+9=10 vs DC 16] FAIL! 3 psychic damage. HP: 132/135
